info.title: Azure Cost Management - Query Usage API
info.description: Query usage data for a defined scope using Azure Cost Management.

post.description: Query the usage data for the defined scope.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope for the query. Examples: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}', '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}', '/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{billingAccountId}', '/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupId}'.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: The API version to use for this operation.

204.description: No content to return for this request.

QueryDataset.description: The definition of data present in the query.

aggregation.description: Dictionary of aggregation expressions (max 2). Each key is the alias for the aggregated column.

QueryDatasetConfiguration.description: The configuration of dataset in the query. Ignored if aggregation and grouping are provided.

columns.description: Array of column names to include in the query.

QueryAggregation.description: The aggregation expression to be used in the query.

name.description: The name of the column to aggregate.

QueryGrouping.description: The group-by expression to be used in the query.

name.description: The name of the column to group.

QueryFilter.description: The filter expression to be used in the query.

and.description: Logical AND expression. Must have at least 2 items.

or.description: Logical OR expression. Must have at least 2 items.

QueryComparisonExpression.description: The comparison expression to be used in the query.

name.description: The name of the column to use in comparison.

values.description: Array of values to use for comparison.

QueryTimePeriod.description: The start and end date for pulling data for the query.

from.description: The start date to pull data from.

to.description: The end date to pull data to.

QueryResult.description: Result of query. Contains all columns listed under groupings and aggregation.

rows.description: Array of rows. Each row is an array of values corresponding to the columns.

nextLink.description: The link (url) to the next page of results.

type.description: The type of the column (e.g. Number, String).

message.description: Error message indicating why the operation failed.

ExportType.description: The type of the query. 'Usage' is equivalent to 'ActualCost'.

TimeframeType.description: The time frame for pulling data. Use 'Custom' with timePeriod for a specific date range.

GranularityType.description: The granularity of rows in the query.

QueryColumnType.description: The type of the column to group by.

QueryOperatorType.description: The operator to use for comparison.
